problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: If Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
